birdsarentreal
  • API Reference
  • faculty_instructor
  • faculty_instructor.routes
  • View page source

faculty_instructor.routes

Faculty instructor routes: course list, class roster, grade entry, and grade submission.

All routes require an authenticated session with role ‘faculty_instructor’ or ‘system_admin’. Routes are registered on the ‘faculty_instructor’ blueprint.

Functions

index()

Render the faculty home dashboard.

courses()

Render a list of course offerings assigned to the logged-in instructor.

roster()

Render the class roster for all courses taught by the logged-in instructor.

grades()

Render the grade entry form for students with in-progress (IP) grades.

submit_grade(enroll_id)

Submit a final grade for a specific enrollment record (POST only).

Module Contents

faculty_instructor.routes.index()[source]

Render the faculty home dashboard.

faculty_instructor.routes.courses()[source]

Render a list of course offerings assigned to the logged-in instructor.

Joins c_offering with c_catalog and schedule to display course code, title, credits, semester, day, and time for each assigned section.

faculty_instructor.routes.roster()[source]

Render the class roster for all courses taught by the logged-in instructor.

Joins offerings, catalog, enrollment, plan, and users tables to list each enrolled student’s name, email, and current grade, grouped by course.

faculty_instructor.routes.grades()[source]

Render the grade entry form for students with in-progress (IP) grades.

Only shows enrollments where grade=’IP’, preventing faculty from seeing or interacting with already-submitted grades.

faculty_instructor.routes.submit_grade(enroll_id)[source]

Submit a final grade for a specific enrollment record (POST only).

Validates that the grade value is in the allowed set, verifies that the enrollment belongs to a course taught by the requesting instructor, and confirms the grade is still ‘IP’ before updating. Rejects attempts to overwrite an already-submitted grade.

Parameters:

enroll_id (int) – The enrollment record to update.
